label: Go away
subject_description: A stern-looking boy with a firm serious facial expression, standing facing the viewer, pointing with one fully extended arm and index finger clearly off to the side toward the RIGHT away from himself, the pointing gesture is the clear focal point of the image, head and shoulders, the message is unambiguously 'go away' / 'leave'
full_prompt: A stern-looking boy with a firm serious facial expression, standing facing the viewer, pointing with one fully extended arm and index finger clearly off to the side toward the RIGHT away from himself, the pointing gesture is the clear focal point of the image, head and shoulders, the message is unambiguously 'go away' / 'leave', children's AAC communication symbol, friendly illustration style, soft rounded shapes, vibrant coloured fills with gentle shading, white background, single object centred, no text, no labels, crisp clean lines, warm and engaging, human figures with natural skin tones (avoid bright red on skin), no medication or pills, style similar to PCS HD educational picture symbols.

label: Try
subject_description: A curious-looking child with an open friendly expression (slightly raised eyebrows, slight smile or neutral mouth — NOT angry, NOT sad, NOT distressed), both hands held out in front of them at chest height with palms facing UP and slightly outward in an 'I'll give it a go' gesture, head and shoulders, the gesture and expression together communicate 'I'll try / I'll attempt'
